notes: Use stress_points for a manually reviewed bond event only when size, pricing, security, covenant, or use-of-proceeds terms add genuine funding stress beyond the fact of issuance.
For spread_observations, record issuer, as_of, spread_bps, change_30d_bps, security or maturity, and source.
For rating_events, record issuer, date, agency, action, notches, previous_rating, new_rating, outlook, and source.
For fcf_revisions, record issuer, as_of, horizon, previous_estimate, new_estimate, revision_pct, currency, and source.
